# Using scripts in skills

class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

<div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&>*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]">

How to run commands and bundle executable scripts in your skills.

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Using scripts in skills"
page-href="/skill-creation/using-scripts">

<span data-as="p">Skills can instruct agents to run shell commands and
bundle reusable scripts in a `scripts/` directory. This guide covers
one-off commands, self-contained scripts with their own dependencies,
and how to design script interfaces for agentic use.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#one-off-commands"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">One-off commands</span>

<span data-as="p">When an existing package already does what you need,
you can reference it directly in your `SKILL.md` instructions without a
`scripts/` directory. Many ecosystems provide tools that auto-resolve
dependencies at runtime.</span>

<div id="uvx" class="tabs tabs tab-container">

- <div id="uvx">

<div id="panel-uvx-0"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="uvx" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://docs.astral.sh/uv/guides/tools/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">uvx</a> runs Python packages in
isolated environments with aggressive caching. It ships with
<a href="https://docs.astral.sh/uv/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">uv</a>.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
uvx ruff@0.8.0 check .
uvx black@24.10.0 .
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Not bundled with Python — requires a separate install.
- Fast. Caches aggressively so repeat runs are near-instant.

</div>

<div id="panel-pipx-1"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="pipx" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://pipx.pypa.io/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">pipx</a> runs Python packages in isolated environments.
Available via OS package managers (`apt install pipx`,
`brew install pipx`).</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
pipx run 'black==24.10.0' .
pipx run 'ruff==0.8.0' check .
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Not bundled with Python — requires a separate install.
- A mature alternative to `uvx`. While `uvx` has become the standard
  recommendation, `pipx` remains a reliable option with broader OS
  package manager availability.

</div>

<div id="panel-npx-2"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://docs.npmjs.com/cli/commands/npx" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">npx</a> runs npm packages, downloading
them on demand. It ships with npm (which ships with Node.js).</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img

class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
npx eslint@9 --fix .
npx create-vite@6 my-app
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Bundled with Node.js — no extra install needed.
- Downloads the package, runs it, and caches it for future use.
- Pin versions with `npx package@version` for reproducibility.

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"

- Only appropriate when the user’s environment has Bun rather than
  Node.js.

<div id="panel-deno-run-4"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://docs.deno.com/runtime/reference/cli/run/" class="link"
target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">deno run</a> runs scripts directly from
URLs or specifiers. It ships with
<a href="https://deno.com/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Deno</a>.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
deno run npm:create-vite@6 my-app
deno run --allow-read npm:eslint@9 -- --fix .
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Permission flags (`--allow-read`, etc.) are required for
  filesystem/network access.
- Use `--` to separate Deno flags from the tool’s own flags.

</div>

<div id="panel-go-run-5"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="go-run" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://pkg.go.dev/cmd/go#hdr-Compile_and_run_Go_program"
class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">go run</a> compiles and
runs Go packages directly. It is built into the `go` command.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="2" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports@v0.28.0 .
go run github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@v1.62.0 run
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Built into Go — no extra tooling needed.
- Pin versions or use `@latest` to make the command explicit.

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">**Tips for one-off commands in skills:**</span>

- **Pin versions** (e.g., `npx eslint@9.0.0`) so the command behaves the
  same over time.
- **State prerequisites** in your `SKILL.md` (e.g., “Requires Node.js
  18+”) rather than assuming the agent’s environment has them. For
  runtime-level requirements, use the
  <a href="../specification.html#compatibility-field"
  class="link"><code>compatibility</code> frontmatter field</a>.
- **Move complex commands into scripts.** A one-off command works well
  when you’re invoking a tool with a few flags. When a command grows
  complex enough that it’s hard to get right on the first try, a tested
  script in `scripts/` is more reliable.

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#referencing-scripts-from-skill-md"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Referencing scripts from `SKILL.md`</span>

<span data-as="p">Use **relative paths from the skill directory root**
to reference bundled files. The agent resolves these paths automatically
— no absolute paths needed.</span> <span data-as="p">List available
scripts in your `SKILL.md` so the agent knows they exist:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="4" language="markdown">

<div class="flex text-gray-400 text-xs rounded-t-[14px] leading-6 font-medium pl-4 pr-2.5 py-1"
component-part="code-block-header">

<div class="flex-grow-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 min-w-0"
component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<span class="truncate min-w-0" title="SKILL.md">SKILL.md</span>

</div>

## Available scripts

- **`scripts/validate.sh`** — Validates configuration files
- **`scripts/process.py`** — Processes input data

<span data-as="p">Then instruct the agent to run them:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="11" language="markdown">

component-part="code-block-header-filename">

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

```` shiki
## Workflow

1. Run the validation script:
   ```bash
   bash scripts/validate.sh "$INPUT_FILE"
   ```

2. Process the results:
   ```bash
   python3 scripts/process.py --input results.json
   ```
````

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20"
callout-type="note">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" />

<div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&_code]:!text-current [&_kbd]:!text-current [&_a]:!text-current [&_a]:border-current [&_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"
component-part="callout-content">

<span data-as="p">The same relative-path convention works in support
files like `references/*.md` — script execution paths (in code blocks)
are relative to the **skill directory root**, because the agent runs
commands from there.</span>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#self-contained-scripts"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Self-contained scripts</span>

<span data-as="p">When you need reusable logic, bundle a script in
`scripts/` that declares its own dependencies inline. The agent can run
the script with a single command — no separate manifest file or install
step required.</span> <span data-as="p">Several languages support inline
dependency declarations:</span>

<div id="python" class="tabs tabs tab-container">

- <div id="python">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-primary dark:text-primary-light border-current"
  component-part="tab-button" active="true" testid="tab-Python">

  Python

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="deno">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Deno">

  Deno

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="bun">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Bun">

  Bun

  </div>

  </div>

- <div id="ruby">

  <div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700"
  component-part="tab-button" active="false" testid="tab-Ruby">

  Ruby

  </div>

  </div>

<div>

<div id="panel-python-0"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="python" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p"><a href="https://peps.python.org/pep-0723/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">PEP 723</a> defines a standard format for inline script
metadata. Declare dependencies in a TOML block inside `# ///`
markers:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="10" language="python">

component-part="code-block-header-filename">

title="scripts/extract.py">scripts/extract.py</span>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# /// script
# dependencies = [
#   "beautifulsoup4",
# ]
# ///

from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

html = '<html><body><h1>Welcome</h1><p class="info">This is a test.</p></body></html>'
print(BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser").select_one("p.info").get_text())
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Run with
<a href="https://docs.astral.sh/uv/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">uv</a> (recommended):</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
uv run scripts/extract.py
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">`uv run` creates an isolated environment, installs the
declared dependencies, and runs the script.
<a href="https://pipx.pypa.io/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">pipx</a> (`pipx run scripts/extract.py`) also supports
PEP 723.</span>

- Pin versions with
  <a href="https://peps.python.org/pep-0508/" class="link" target="_blank"
  rel="noreferrer">PEP 508</a> specifiers: `"beautifulsoup4>=4.12,<5"`.
- Use `requires-python` to constrain the Python version.
- Use `uv lock --script` to create a lockfile for full reproducibility.

</div>

<div id="panel-deno-1"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="deno" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Deno’s `npm:` and `jsr:` import specifiers make every
script self-contained by default:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="7" language="typescript">

title="scripts/extract.ts">scripts/extract.ts</span>

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
#!/usr/bin/env -S deno run

import * as cheerio from "npm:cheerio@1.0.0";

const html = `<html><body><h1>Welcome</h1><p class="info">This is a test.</p></body></html>`;
const $ = cheerio.load(html);
console.log($("p.info").text());
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
deno run scripts/extract.ts
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- Use `npm:` for npm packages, `jsr:` for Deno-native packages.
- Version specifiers follow semver: `@1.0.0` (exact), `@^1.0.0`
  (compatible).
- Dependencies are cached globally. Use `--reload` to force re-fetch.
- Packages with native addons (node-gyp) may not work — packages that
  ship pre-built binaries work best.

</div>

<div id="panel-bun-2"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="bun" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Bun auto-installs missing packages at runtime when no
`node_modules` directory is found. Pin versions directly in the import
path:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
#!/usr/bin/env bun

import * as cheerio from "cheerio@1.0.0";

const html = `<html><body><h1>Welcome</h1><p class="info">This is a test.</p></body></html>`;
const $ = cheerio.load(html);
console.log($("p.info").text());
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
bun run scripts/extract.ts
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

- No `package.json` or `node_modules` needed. TypeScript works natively.
- Packages are cached globally. First run downloads; subsequent runs are
  near-instant.
- If a `node_modules` directory exists anywhere up the directory tree,
  auto-install is disabled and Bun falls back to standard Node.js
  resolution.

</div>

<div id="panel-ruby-3"
class="prose dark:prose-dark overflow-x-auto [&_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&_[role="listitem"]]:pl-4 [&>:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&>:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&>:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:!pt-0 hidden"
role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="ruby" component-part="tab-content">

<span data-as="p">Bundler ships with Ruby since 2.6. Use
`bundler/inline` to declare gems directly in the script:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/5 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark p-0.5"
numberoflines="10" language="ruby">

title="scripts/extract.rb">scripts/extract.rb</span>

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-xt bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
require 'bundler/inline'

gemfile do
  source 'https://rubygems.org'
  gem 'nokogiri'
end

html = '<html><body><h1>Welcome</h1><p class="info">This is a test.</p></body></html>'
doc = Nokogiri::HTML(html)
puts doc.at_css('p.info').text
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

numberoflines="1" language="shellscript">

floating-buttons="true">

class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"

- Pin versions explicitly (`gem 'nokogiri', '~> 1.16'`) — there is no
  lockfile.
- An existing `Gemfile` or `BUNDLE_GEMFILE` env var in the working
  directory can interfere.

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#designing-scripts-for-agentic-use"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Designing scripts for agentic use</span>

<span data-as="p">When an agent runs your script, it reads stdout and
stderr to decide what to do next. A few design choices make scripts
dramatically easier for agents to use.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#avoid-interactive-prompts"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Avoid interactive prompts</span>

<span data-as="p">This is a hard requirement of the agent execution
environment. Agents operate in non-interactive shells — they cannot
respond to TTY prompts, password dialogs, or confirmation menus. A
script that blocks on interactive input will hang indefinitely.</span>
<span data-as="p">Accept all input via command-line flags, environment
variables, or stdin:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="9" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# Bad: hangs waiting for input
$ python scripts/deploy.py
Target environment: _

# Good: clear error with guidance
$ python scripts/deploy.py
Error: --env is required. Options: development, staging, production.
Usage: python scripts/deploy.py --env staging --tag v1.2.3
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#document-usage-with-help"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Document usage with `--help`</span>

<span data-as="p">`--help` output is the primary way an agent learns
your script’s interface. Include a brief description, available flags,
and usage examples:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="13" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
Usage: scripts/process.py [OPTIONS] INPUT_FILE

Process input data and produce a summary report.

Options:
  --format FORMAT    Output format: json, csv, table (default: json)
  --output FILE      Write output to FILE instead of stdout
  --verbose          Print progress to stderr

Examples:
  scripts/process.py data.csv
  scripts/process.py --format csv --output report.csv data.csv
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Keep it concise — the output enters the agent’s
context window alongside everything else it’s working with.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#write-helpful-error-messages"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Write helpful error messages</span>

<span data-as="p">When an agent gets an error, the message directly
shapes its next attempt. An opaque “Error: invalid input” wastes a turn.
Instead, say what went wrong, what was expected, and what to try:</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="3" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
Error: --format must be one of: json, csv, table.
       Received: "xml"
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#use-structured-output"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Use structured output</span>

<span data-as="p">Prefer structured formats — JSON, CSV, TSV — over
free-form text. Structured formats can be consumed by both the agent and
standard tools (`jq`, `cut`, `awk`), making your script composable in
pipelines.</span>

<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent"
numberoflines="7" language="text">

<div class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"
floating-buttons="true">

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

<div class="z-10 select-none" state="closed">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/ask-ai-button:text-white/60" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&_*]:ring-0 [&_*]:outline-0 [&_*]:focus:ring-0 [&_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25"
component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0"
style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E">

<div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6">

``` shiki
# Whitespace-aligned — hard to parse programmatically
NAME          STATUS    CREATED
my-service    running   2025-01-15

# Delimited — unambiguous field boundaries
{"name": "my-service", "status": "running", "created": "2025-01-15"}
```

</div>

</div>

<div class="print:hidden" fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true"
style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E">

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">**Separate data from diagnostics:** send structured
data to stdout and progress messages, warnings, and other diagnostics to
stderr. This lets the agent capture clean, parseable output while still
having access to diagnostic information when needed.</span>

### 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="using-scripts.html#further-considerations"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Further considerations</span>

- **Idempotency.** Agents may retry commands. “Create if not exists” is
  safer than “create and fail on duplicate.”
- **Input constraints.** Reject ambiguous input with a clear error
  rather than guessing. Use enums and closed sets where possible.
- **Dry-run support.** For destructive or stateful operations, a
  `--dry-run` flag lets the agent preview what will happen.
- **Meaningful exit codes.** Use distinct exit codes for different
  failure types (not found, invalid arguments, auth failure) and
  document them in your `--help` output so the agent knows what each
  code means.
- **Safe defaults.** Consider whether destructive operations should
  require explicit confirmation flags (`--confirm`, `--force`) or other
  safeguards appropriate to the risk level.
- **Predictable output size.** Many agent harnesses automatically
  truncate tool output beyond a threshold (e.g., 10-30K characters),
  potentially losing critical information. If your script might produce
  large output, default to a summary or a reasonable limit, and support
  flags like `--offset` so the agent can request more information when
  needed. Alternatively, if output is large and not amenable to
  pagination, require agents to pass an `--output` flag that specifies
  either an output file or `-` to explicitly opt in to stdout.

</div>
